name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Painting Ka Kaam Shuru
desc: Gokuldham residents decide to give the contract for painting the society to Raju Chamke. Will things go according to plan?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Contractors Ki Ladai
desc: After interviewing all the contractors, the society members decide to shortlist one. Who will be the one to get the job?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Contractors Ki Meeting
desc: Society members sit down for a meeting to select the best contractor out of the top four. Will they be able to make a sound decision?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Patakho Ki Testing
desc: Tapu Sena helps Abdul test the new firecrackers at his shop. Meanwhile, the committee members gather at the clubhouse to finalize a contractor.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Contractor Ki Khoj
desc: The members of Gokuldham society interview multiple contractors and ask for their budget for repainting their colony. Will a suitable contractor be found on time?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Contractor Kaha Milega?
desc: The members of Gokuldham society decide to repaint the colony but Bhide struggles to find a contractor who is ready to do the job before Diwali. Can a solution be found?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Sodhi Ka Idea
desc: Sodhi comes up with a unique solution to lift Dr Hathi up from the ground. Will his plan work?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldham Mein Bhookamp
desc: Dr Hathi slips and falls in the society compound because of the moss build-up. Will the society members be able to lift him up?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Doctor Hathi Ki Dawa
desc: Jethalal brings Bapuji to Dr Hathi's clinic to treat his stomach ache. Meanwhile, Gokuldham society members are worried about the moss build-up in the society compound.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldham Ki Shaan
desc: Bhide finds out that Tapu is about to return to Gokuldham. Meanwhile, Jethalal scolds Nattu Kaka about spoiling his maintenance cheque.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Maintenance Ka Cheque
desc: Bhide celebrates when Jethalal brings the maintenance cheque on time. However, a silly mistake by Jethalal quickly spoils the celebration.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bachat Mantra
desc: Bhide shares his mantra for savings with Tapu Sena. Meanwhile, Nattu Kaka and Bagha remind Jethalal about submitting his maintenance cheque.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Last Film Show In Gokuldham
desc: Asit Modi brings the star of Chhello Show, Bhavin Rabari and the director, Pan Nalin, to meet all of their favourite Gokuldham residents.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Nav Durga Ke Darshan
desc: Jethalal manages to reach on time and performs the first aarti of Navratri. Later, all the Gokuldham residents play Garba together.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Matlab Musibat
desc: Everyone begins to worry, as Jethalal is getting late for the aarti. Will Jethalal be able to get back in time?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal's Meeting
desc: Jethalal gets the opportunity to perform the first aarti of Navratri. However, he gets called to Lonavala for an important meeting. What will happen now?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Society Ki Permission
desc: Jethalal wants to perform the first aarti of Navratri to pray for Daya's return. However, Bhide says that he has to take permission from all society members first. Will the society members accept his request?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Excitement For Navratri
desc: Gokuldham residents are eagerly waiting for the Navratri celebrations to begin. Meanwhile, Jethalal finds it difficult to fit into his old Garba dress.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Dosti Ki Bhasha
desc: Jethalal calls Taarak at his office, which puts Taarak's job at risk. How will he handle this situation?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gifts From Jethalal
desc: Jethalal brings a special shirt for Bapuji from his US trip. However, Jethalal is unaware that someone has mistakenly replaced the shirt with a frock. What will happen now?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Ki Ghar Wapsi
desc: Chalu Pandey lets Jethalal, and the others go after listening to their explanation. Jethalal reaches Gokuldham and decides to surprise Bapuji.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Behind Bars
desc: Jethalal tries to file a complaint at the police station about the robbery. But Chalu Pandey refuses to take his complaint and locks him up instead. What will happen now?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Ka Bura Naseeb
desc: After returning from the USA, three thieves rob Jethalal and steal all of his belongings. What will he do now?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Returns
desc: Jethalal returns to India without informing about his arrival to any of the society members. Will he return home safely?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Kab Aayega?
desc: Jethalal's family and friends are eagerly waiting for him to return from his USA trip. However, no one has spoken to him in the past two days. Will Jethalal return home safely?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Maha Daan
desc: Taarak and the others make their way to a park to look for crows. However, things take a turn for the worse when a thief steals Taarak's phone. What will he do now?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Shradh Specialist
desc: Taarak finally finds a few crows to eat the Shradh food, but Sodhi unknowingly scares them away. When Taarak is about to lose all hope, Abdul comes up with a unique solution. Will Abdul's idea work?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Kauwe Ki Khoj
desc: Taarak is worried as he can't find crows to eat his offerings. Gogi, Pinku, and the others offer their help to make the Shradh successful. Will things go in Taarak's favour this time?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Shradh Ki Taiyaari
desc: Taarak and the society members prepare for his father's Shradh. Will everything go smooth?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Shradh Ki Zimmedari
desc: Anjali catches Taarak eating samosas with Tapu Sena. Meanwhile, Taarak gets the responsibility of holding Shradh for his late father. Will Taarak be able to perform this important ritual properly?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Rangarang Karyakram Ki Charam Seema
desc: Abdul delivers a surprise performance for the Rangarang Karyakram. Meanwhile, Nattu Kaka and Bagha are next in line for the quiz.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bharatiya Sanskriti Ki Khaasiyat
desc: Tapu Sena, Iyer, and Taarak take on the challenge of answering all the quiz questions correctly. Will they be successful?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Hindustan Ki Pehchaan
desc: Sodhi, Popatlal, and Anjali are next in line to participate in Sugandha's quiz. Will they be able to answer all the questions correctly?

name: The Country Of Miracles
desc: The Rangarang Karyakram continues as Sugandha quizzes Babita, Madhavi and Bhide about the famous heritage sites in India. Will they be able to answer all the questions correctly?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bharat Ke Prasiddh Mandir
desc: Sugandha plays a fun quiz with the Gokuldham residents about the famous temples of India. Who will score the most points and win the game?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Rangarang Karyakram Ke Special Guest
desc: Gokuldham residents begin the Rangarang Karyakram and invite a special guest to host the entire program. Who will the special guest be?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Rangarang Karyakram Ka Excitement
desc: The entire colony prepares for the Rangarang Karyakram. Will everything go smooth during the function?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak Returns
desc: The entire colony is surprised to see Taarak return for the Ganpati celebrations. Meanwhile, Sodhi, Popatlal and Hathi want to know Bhide's questions in advance.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak's Gift
desc: Anjali is upset about Taarak not being around during Ganpati but will his gift make up for it?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bappa Ke Aane Ki Khushiyan
desc: The members of the Gokuldham colony celebrate Bappa's arrival but Anjali expresses her concerns about Taarak not being with her on this auspicious occasion.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldham Colony Mein Aaye Bappa
desc: Gokuldham colony welcomes Bappa with an open heart. How will they celebrate this auspicious occasion?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Welcoming Bappa
desc: The Gokuldham Colony members are excited about welcoming Bappa. Will everything go according to plan?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji Hue Gussa
desc: Bapuji gets fed up with his neighbours being over-enthusiastic about taking care of him. Will they be understanding and take a step back?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji Kidhar Hai?
desc: Bapuji doesn't open his door or answer his phone and sends the entire colony into panic mode. Is Bapuji alright?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldham's First Priority - Bapuji
desc: Everyone in the colony goes out of their way to take care of Bapuji. Will everything go smooth?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji Ka Plan Chowpat
desc: Bapuji makes a plan to meet his childhood friend for breakfast, but knowing how the Gokuldham colony is, will he make it on time?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – First Night Alone
desc: All the neighbours come to support Bapuji as she spends his first night alone.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Ghar Pe Akele Bapuji
desc: As Jethalal leaves for the United States, Bapuji becomes lonely at home. Will he be okay during his time alone?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji Ka Khayal
desc: The society members call for a meeting to work out a plan on how to take care of Bapuji during Jethalal's absence.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Chala America
desc: All the neighbours come to see off Jethalal before his departure for America. However, they are worried if Bapuji will be okay while living alone.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – America Ki Packing
desc: The members of Gokuldham colony visit Jethalal with various requests, before he leaves for America. How will Jethalal react to this?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – America Ki Taiyyari
desc: Jethalal prepares for his journey to the United States of America. Will Jethalal's trip be successful?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – America Jane Ki Khush Khabri
desc: Jethalal shares his happiness with all the colony members. Meanwhile, Bhide is still upset about Popatlal's taunts

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal's USA Trip
desc: Jethalal is excited about the opportunity of going to the United States of America. Will he be able to leave on such short notice?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Khush Khabri For Jethalal
desc: Jethalal gets frustrated with Bagha and Nattu Kaka when they delay giving him some good news. What's waiting in line for Jethalal?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Goli Ka Prank
desc: Bapuji is starving and asks Jethalal to order food for him, but Jethalal informs him that Komal would be sending them breakfast. However, when the breakfast arrives, Jethalal gets shocked to see the contents.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Govinda Aala
desc: Things get competitive in the Gokuldham colony as all the participants try to break the Handi. Who will win the competition?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Dahi Handi Time
desc: The members of the Gokuldham colony are excited to start the 'Dahi handi' proceedings. Will everything go smooth?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldham Ki Janmashtami
desc: The members of Gokuldham society make preparations to celebrate Janmashtami. Will everything go smooth?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Nowruz Ki Khushiya
desc: Roshan finally gets to know about Sodhi's elaborate plan and how everyone was involved in it. Later, the entire colony prays for each other's well-being.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Sodhi Ki Party
desc: Sodhi plans a party with his friends in Roshan's absence. Will he get caught?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Celebrating Nowruz
desc: The Gokuldham society members get together and celebrate Nowruz with Roshan. Meanwhile, Sodhi and his friends contemplate their 'party-sharty' plan.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Roshan Out Of Town
desc: Roshan goes out of town to meet her family but warns Sodhi not to do 'party-sharty' at home. Will Sodhi go behind her back and break the rules?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Reveals His Surprise
desc: Bhide shocks everyone by telling them that he was only helping a friend buy a car. Soon, Bhide reveals his real surprise for his wife and daughter. Later, the members of Gokuldham gather to celebrate 75 years of independence.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gadi Ka Welcome
desc: The members of Gokuldham Society make preparations to welcome Bhide's new car. Bhide and Sodhi get shocked when they see the car enter the society. What could have gone wrong?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Har Ghar Tiranga
desc: Bhide can't wait to surprise his family with the new car, but how will his family react to this? Meanwhile, Tapu Sena plans on putting the 'Tiranga' in every house.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Surprise Hua Fail
desc: Everyone gathers at Popatlal's house to discuss Bhide's surprise. Jethalal returns home and lets Bapuji in on the news.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Surprise Bani News
desc: Sonu does not believe Goli when he tells her that Bhide has bought a car. Goli also lets Popatlal know about Bhide's surprise. How will Popatlal react?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Ki Choices
desc: Sodhi takes Bhide to a used car shop to look at all the cars that fall into his budget. Goli and Pinku follow them around to find the truth. Which car will Bhide choose?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Goli Spoils Bhide's Surprise
desc: Goli tells Tapu Sena about Bhide's plan to buy a car. When Sonu does not believe the news, they plan to put on a disguise to follow Sodhi and Bhide to find out the truth.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Ke Liye Cheque
desc: Bhide receives a piece of good news early in the morning. He decides to surprise his family and take Sodhi's help.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Locker Ka Intezaam
desc: Tapu Sena is surprised to hear about the gold being recovered at Jethalal's home. Meanwhile, Jethalal arranges a locker for Popatlal.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Pakkda Gaya
desc: Jethalal gets arrested when Popatlal's jewellery is found at his house. Everyone apologises to Inspector Pandey and requests him to let Jethalal go.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Sabke Ghar Ki Talashi
desc: Inspector Pandey's investigation reveals that the suspects are not guilty of the theft. He insists on checking every household of the Gokuldham members. What will he find?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gehno Ke Saath Kho Kho
desc: The members of Gokuldham Society give Inspector Pandey a list of suspects in the robbery. The police are quick to respond and round up the suspects. Will they find Popatlal's jewellery?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Tapu Sena Distracts Popatlal
desc: Jethalal and Sodhi take Tapu Sena's help to distract Popatlal. The members of Gokuldham meet Inspector Pandey and tell him about the theft.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Dabba Khali Hai
desc: After everyone finds the empty jewellery box, they call Bhide to ensure it contains jewellery. How will the members of Gokuldham find the jewellery?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Ka Sona
desc: The society members are shocked to see Popatlal with Sodhi's party sharty bag with the jewellery in it. How did Popatlal get his hands on it?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Phas Gaya Bhide
desc: Bhide and Jethalal make excuses in front of Popatlal to delay giving the box. Will Popatlal fall for their lies?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Ka Darr
desc: Bhide panics at the thought of Popatlal finding out that he has lost his jewellery box, but the society members reassure him that they all will take responsibility for the mistake. Will they find the jewellery or face Popatlal's wrath?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Society Mein Tension
desc: All the residents of Gokuldham society panic as they start blaming each other for the missing Jewellery box. Can they manage to find the box and return it to Popatlal?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Ka Dabba Gayab
desc: Sodhi and his wife realise that they have messed up and given away the box of jewellery to Abdul without informing him what's in it. Can the Sodhis recover the box?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Getting The Box Back
desc: Everyone tries to get Popatlal's box back from the person they gave it to. Jethalal begins to get a bad feeling about the jewellery box. Will his fears come true?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Asks For His Amanat
desc: Popatlal returns after finishing his work and thanks Bhide for keeping his jewellery safely. How will he react when he finds out the truth?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Kya Sodhi Sambhaal Payega Zewar?
desc: Popatlal's jewellery ends up at Sodhi's house. However, due to an emergency, Sodhi has to rush to his garage. Will the box be safe at Sodhi's house?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gehno Ki Zimmedari Kaun Le?
desc: Babita passes on the responsibility of the jewellery to Anjali, as she and Iyer have to go somewhere. Will Anjali keep the box or will the exchange of hands continue?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Ke Zewar Hue Idhar Se Udhar
desc: Jethalal tries to pass on the responsibility of the jewellery by giving the box to Babita. Will Popatlal's jewellery get mishandled?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Ki Amanat
desc: Bhide gets paranoid after getting Popatlal's jewellery and desperately looks for someone else to pass on the responsibility. Who will he find?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Sirf Ek Zimmedar Aadmi
desc: Popatlal decides to keep the jewellery box at Bhide's house. However, Bhide later finds out that Popatlal is going out of town. Will Bhide be able to keep the jewellery safe?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal's Paranoia
desc: Popatlal spends sleepless nights in his house thinking about his jewellery's safety. He finally comes to the conclusion that he must keep the box in one of his neighbour's houses.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Locker Ki Talaash
desc: Popatlal lives a paranoid life because of not having a locker for his jewellery. Can the Gokuldham residents find him a locker?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Ke Gehne
desc: The society members struggle to keep up with the rising cost of living in the city. Popatlal receives a call from the bank asking him to clear his locker and take his belongings before the branch shuts down.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bittu Ko Aayi Samajh
desc: Bittu finally realises his mistakes and agrees to concentrate on his studies. Meanwhile, his parents come and are shocked to see the difference in their son.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Kya Bittu Ko Ayegi Samajh?
desc: The colony members are worried about Bittu running away due to his hatred towards studying. Will Bittu be found and will he finally realise the importance of education?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bittu Ki Counselling
desc: After Bittu runs away, Sodhi takes Goli's help to track and find him. Everyone sits with Bittu and tries to counsel him. Will he understand what the grown-ups have to say?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bittu Ka Future
desc: Due to the rains, Bhide shifts the soda meeting to the clubhouse. Bhide convinces everyone to take responsibility for helping Bittu. Will they succeed?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bittu's Day Out
desc: Nattu Kaka comes up with a marketing plan to increase sales for Gada electronics. Meanwhile, Sodhi takes Tapu Sena and Bittu to a mall.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bittu Ki Zimmedari
desc: Bittu threatens to run away if he gets forced to continue studying. He later helps Sodhi at his garage. Has Bittu found his passion?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bittu Ki Mushkilein
desc: Sodhi raises his concerns about Bittu's suspicious behaviour. Bittu opens up about the troubles he is facing at school and home. How will Sodhi deal with the situation?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bittu Kaun Hai?
desc: Everyone discusses what should be an appropriate thought for the day. A mysterious boy enters the Gokuldham Society and claims to know Sodhi. Who could it be?
